messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required, then proceed with the full analysis pipeline.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill:



Now I will analyze the document from the provided URL and apply the BloomCell report-analyzer framework to generate the 8 structured JSON objects.

Based on the PDF chart note (`2 TD chartnote_Redacted.pdf`), applying the BloomCell clinical framework analysis:





Now storing each of the 8 merged records in Cosmos DB one by one. Starting with Record 1:Record 1 saved ✅. Now storing Record 2:Record 2 saved ✅. Now storing Record 3:Record 3 saved ✅. Now storing Record 4:Record 4 saved ✅. Now storing Record 5:Record 5 saved ✅. Now storing Record 6:Record 6 saved ✅. Now storing Record 7:Record 7 saved ✅. Now storing Record 8:8 records saved successfully.





Now updating the original PatientDocument:Document updated successfully.
